calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2017 Set For Trial On Mar-01-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 303

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:33 am - Matter called. Appearances stated as follows:
Vincenzo Signoretti, Appellant in pro per, present.
Albert L. Boasberg, Esq. for and with Daniel Simpson, Vice President/Manager of John's Jaguar, Respondent, present.
10:34 am - The clerk administers the oath and both parties are sworn to testify.
10:35 am - Appellant, Vincenzo Signoretti, testifies.
11;14 am - Appellant's Exhibit 1, Invoice dated 11/24/15, is marked for identification.
11:17 am - Appellant's Exhibit 2, Invoice dated 6/23/16, is marked for identification.
11:34 am - Cross-examination by Albert L. Boasberg of Mr. Signoretti.
11:36 am - Respondent's representative, Daniel Simpson, testifies under direct examination by Mr. Boasberg.
11:37 am - Respondent's Exhibit A, Notice of DMV/Toll Records, is marked for identification.
Respondent's Exhibit B, Copies of Written Estimates (various sizes of paper/notes - a total of 4 pages), is marked for identification.
Respondent's Exhibit C, Invoice dated 6/23/16, is marked for identification.
Respondent's Exhibit D, Emails - a total of 8 pages, is marked for identification. 11:46 am - Cross-examination by Mr. Signoretti of Mr. Simpson.
11:57 am - Questions by the Court. Additional testimony by parties.
12:03 pm - The Court declares the lunch recess. Parties are ordered to return at 1:40 pm.
1:41 pm - The Court, the parties, and counsel as set forth above are present in court.
The Court inquires whether or not John's Jaquar is registered, noting that all auto repair shops must be registered with the Bureau of Automotive Repair. Mr. Simpson responds stating that there is a license posted at the business.
1:43 pm - Exhibits admitted, matter submitted.
1:45 pm - The Court sets forth its rationale for the parties noting the Business & Professions Codes 9884 and 9884.9(a).
1:48 pm - The Court takes a brief recess to allow counsel/parties time to attempt to reach an agreement.
2:01 pm - All present. Mr. Boasberg states that an agreement has been reached. Parties agree to the following: Judgment in favor of the appellant, Vincenzo Signoretti, in the amount of $1,635.72, and payment upon two weeks from today's date for Respondent to remove parts from the vehicle and for appellant to find storage for the vehicle.
2:04 pm - Judgment entered/signed by the Court per agreement of the parties.
2:05 pm - Appellant and Respondent's exhibits are returned in open court.
2:06 pm - Court adjourned.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Continued To Mar-01-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Feb-23-2017 Continued To Feb-27-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
